title: Archery Revamped
description:
Shows tipped arrows of crossbows and much more!

-No mods required.
body:
> **Feature list:** 
> 
Unique textures for each arrow type (even long and strong tipped arrows)

Revamped bow and crossbow textures
- Bogged, stray and parched shoot corresponding arrows
- 3D arrows on crossbows
- Multishot texture for crossbows
- Flame bow texture
- Crossbows showing what kind of arrow they are storing.
> **Recommendation**
- Also use my [Potion Indication](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/potion-indication) pack which uses same principle but for potions! (this pack has to be above the potion pack)

<details>
<summary>Credits</summary>

[Reijvi](https://modrinth.com/user/Reijvi):Using his stick color palette for my crossbows and using his arrow texture.

[Lin-y-fer](https://www.planetminecraft.com/member/lin-y-fer/):Bow texture is based on his texture.

[MushirMickeyJoe](https://modrinth.com/user/mushirmickeyjoe):Display values for bow.

</details>
